title: AddHealth - Digital ADHD Assessment and Support
problem: ADHD assessment wait times are extremely long. Many adults go undiagnosed due to limited specialist availability.
solution: Digital platform for ADHD screening, assessment support, and ongoing management tools for patients and clinicians.
technology: Digital assessment tools, patient tracking, clinician dashboard
regulatory_notes: Clinical assessment support, medical device considerations.
varden_fit: Moderate — specialized ADHD assessment. Could partner with psychiatry providers on Varden.
notes: Specialized neuropsychiatry digital health. Narrow focus.
